acceptance_conditions.label: protocol and source bindings remain exact
two full repeats reproduce R142 selections
two halving repeats reproduce R143 selections
secret schedule and transcript hashes verify
acceptance_conditions.threshold: ABBA or BAAB from committed secret

acceptance_conditions.label: downstream claims and credit remain false

claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: cross-machine or cross-calibration transfer, hardware or cloud billing savings, soundness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: one same-machine counterbalanced repeated-order execution-loop timing result if all gates accept

requirements.label: contract and protocol hashes remain bound
four timed records follow the secret schedule
all timing and execution values are positive
pairing rule creates two matched full/halving pairs
claim boundary and zero credit remain explicit
